历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 12,617; in 2023, approximately 9,613; in 2024, approximately 6,750; in 2025, approximately 5,750 for physics category. Over the past four years, the rank has continuously moved forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 6,867, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The baseline rank for 2025 is approximately 5,750. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics category from 2022 to 2026 is consistently 20 students, with the plan remaining unchanged for five consecutive years, showing no signals of expansion or reduction, and a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms and reflecting a moderately high level of application attention. Guangxi University is in the fifth round.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The majors recruited by the university in Ningxia, such as Automation, Electronic Science and Technology, Information Security, and Energy and Power Engineering, belong to currently highly recommended directions like Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science, positively driving applications. The total number of Ningxia college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 66,000, slightly increasing from 2025 (44,491 in physics category + 21,406 in history category = 65,897), intensifying overall competition slightly. In 2026, Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, far from Ningxia, making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia is stable at 20 students, a relatively small proportion, so geographical preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, steady improvement in Soft Science rankings, stable enrollment plan, relatively high major popularity, and a slight increase in the total number of local candidates, it is expected that the competition heat will continue in 2026, with the rank continuing to move forward slightly from the 2025 baseline of 5,750. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 5,720, with a range of 5,220 to 6,220.
